30: func (p *DynConfBuilder) build(ctx context.Context, containersInspected []dockerData) *dynamic.Configuration {
31: 	configurations := make(map[string]*dynamic.Configuration)
32: 
33: 	for _, container := range containersInspected {
34: 		containerName := getServiceName(container) + "-" + container.ID
35: 
36: 		logger := log.Ctx(ctx).With().Str("container", containerName).Logger()
37: 		ctxContainer := logger.WithContext(ctx)
38: 
39: 		if !p.keepContainer(ctxContainer, container) {
40: 			continue
41: 		}
42: 
43: 		confFromLabel, err := label.DecodeConfiguration(container.Labels)
44: 		if err != nil {
45: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
46: 			continue
47: 		}
48: 
49: 		var tcpOrUDP bool
50: 		if len(confFromLabel.TCP.Routers) > 0 || len(confFromLabel.TCP.Services) > 0 {
51: 			tcpOrUDP = true
52: 
53: 			err := p.buildTCPServiceConfiguration(ctxContainer, container, confFromLabel.TCP)
54: 			if err != nil {
55: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
56: 				continue
57: 			}
58: 			provider.BuildTCPRouterConfiguration(ctxContainer, confFromLabel.TCP)
59: 		}
60: 
61: 		if len(confFromLabel.UDP.Routers) > 0 || len(confFromLabel.UDP.Services) > 0 {
62: 			tcpOrUDP = true
63: 
64: 			err := p.buildUDPServiceConfiguration(ctxContainer, container, confFromLabel.UDP)
65: 			if err != nil {
66: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
67: 				continue
68: 			}
69: 			provider.BuildUDPRouterConfiguration(ctxContainer, confFromLabel.UDP)
70: 		}
71: 
72: 		if tcpOrUDP && len(confFromLabel.HTTP.Routers) == 0 &&
73: 			len(confFromLabel.HTTP.Middlewares) == 0 &&
74: 			len(confFromLabel.HTTP.Services) == 0 {
75: 			configurations[containerName] = confFromLabel
76: 			continue
77: 		}
78: 
79: 		err = p.buildServiceConfiguration(ctxContainer, container, confFromLabel.HTTP)
80: 		if err != nil {
81: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
82: 			continue
83: 		}
84: 
85: 		serviceName := getServiceName(container)
86: 
87: 		model := struct {
88: 			Name          string
89: 			ContainerName string
90: 			Labels        map[string]string
91: 		}{
92: 			Name:          serviceName,
93: 			ContainerName: strings.TrimPrefix(container.Name, "/"),
94: 			Labels:        container.Labels,
95: 		}
96: 
97: 		provider.BuildRouterConfiguration(ctx, confFromLabel.HTTP, serviceName, p.defaultRuleTpl, model)
98: 
99: 		configurations[containerName] = confFromLabel
100: 	}
101: 
102: 	return provider.Merge(ctx, configurations)
103: }

106: 	serviceName := getServiceName(container)
107: 
108: 	if len(configuration.Services) == 0 {
109: 		configuration.Services = map[string]*dynamic.TCPService{

112: 			},
113: 		}
114: 	}
115: 
116: 	if container.Health != "" && container.Health != dockertypes.Healthy {
117: 		return nil
118: 	}
119: 
120: 	for name, service := range configuration.Services {
121: 		ctx := log.Ctx(ctx).With().Str(logs.ServiceName, name).Logger().WithContext(ctx)
122: 		if err := p.addServerTCP(ctx, container, service.LoadBalancer); err != nil {

125: 	}

183: 	if !container.ExtraConf.Enable {
184: 		logger.Debug().Msg("Filtering disabled container")
185: 		return false

199: 		logger.Debug().Msg("Filtering unhealthy or starting container")
200: 		return false
201: 	}
202: 
203: 	return true
204: }

206: func (p *DynConfBuilder) addServerTCP(ctx context.Context, container dockerData, loadBalancer *dynamic.TCPServersLoadBalancer) error {

212: 		loadBalancer.Servers = []dynamic.TCPServer{{}}
213: 	}

215: 	serverPort := loadBalancer.Servers[0].Port
216: 	loadBalancer.Servers[0].Port = ""

218: 	ip, port, err := p.getIPPort(ctx, container, serverPort)
219: 	if err != nil {
220: 		return err
221: 	}
222: 
223: 	if port == "" {

225: 	}

227: 	loadBalancer.Servers[0].Address = net.JoinHostPort(ip, port)
228: 
229: 	return nil
230: }

234: 		return errors.New("load-balancer is not defined")
235: 	}
236: 
237: 	if len(loadBalancer.Servers) == 0 {

239: 	}

260: 		return errors.New("load-balancer is not defined")
261: 	}
262: 
263: 	if len(loadBalancer.Servers) == 0 {

265: 		server.SetDefaults()
266: 
267: 		loadBalancer.Servers = []dynamic.Server{server}
268: 	}
269: 
270: 	serverPort := loadBalancer.Servers[0].Port

276: 	}

288: func (p *DynConfBuilder) getIPPort(ctx context.Context, container dockerData, serverPort string) (string, string, error) {
289: 	logger := log.Ctx(ctx)
290: 
291: 	var ip, port string
292: 	usedBound := false
293: 
294: 	if p.UseBindPortIP {
295: 		portBinding, err := p.getPortBinding(container, serverPort)
296: 		switch {
297: 		case err != nil:
298: 			logger.Info().Msgf("Unable to find a binding for container %q, falling back on its internal IP/Port.", container.Name)
299: 		case portBinding.HostIP == "0.0.0.0" || len(portBinding.HostIP) == 0:
300: 			logger.Info().Msgf("Cannot determine the IP address (got %q) for %q's binding, falling back on its internal IP/Port.", portBinding.HostIP, container.Name)
301: 		default:
302: 			ip = portBinding.HostIP
303: 			port = portBinding.HostPort
304: 			usedBound = true
305: 		}
306: 	}
307: 
308: 	if !usedBound {
309: 		ip = p.getIPAddress(ctx, container)
310: 		port = getPort(container, serverPort)
311: 	}
312: 
313: 	if len(ip) == 0 {
314: 		return "", "", fmt.Errorf("unable to find the IP address for the container %q: the server is ignored", container.Name)
315: 	}
316: 
317: 	return ip, port, nil
318: }
319: 
320: func (p *DynConfBuilder) getIPAddress(ctx context.Context, container dockerData) string {
321: 	logger := log.Ctx(ctx)
322: 
323: 	netNotFound := false
324: 	if container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network != "" {
325: 		settings := container.NetworkSettings
326: 		if settings.Networks != nil {
327: 			network := settings.Networks[container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network]
328: 			if network != nil {
329: 				return network.Addr
330: 			}
331: 
332: 			netNotFound = true
333: 			logger.Warn().Msgf("Could not find network named %q for container %q. Maybe you're missing the project's prefix in the label?", container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network, container.Name)
334: 		}
335: 	}
336: 
337: 	if container.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode.IsHost() {
338: 		if container.Node != nil && container.Node.IPAddress != "" {
339: 			return container.Node.IPAddress
340: 		}
341: 		if host, err := net.LookupHost("host.docker.internal"); err == nil {
342: 			return host[0]
343: 		}
344: 		if host, err := net.LookupHost("host.containers.internal"); err == nil {
345: 			return host[0]
346: 		}
347: 		return "127.0.0.1"
348: 	}
349: 
350: 	if container.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode.IsContainer() {
351: 		connectedContainer := container.NetworkSettings.NetworkMode.ConnectedContainer()
352: 		containerInspected, err := p.apiClient.ContainerInspect(context.Background(), connectedContainer)
353: 		if err != nil {
354: 			logger.Warn().Err(err).Msgf("Unable to get IP address for container %s: failed to inspect container ID %s", container.Name, connectedContainer)
355: 			return ""
356: 		}
357: 
358: 		// Check connected container for traefik.docker.network,
359: 		// falling back to the network specified on the current container.
360: 		containerParsed := parseContainer(containerInspected)
361: 		extraConf, err := p.extractLabels(containerParsed)
362: 		if err != nil {
363: 			logger.Warn().Err(err).Msgf("Unable to get IP address for container %s : failed to get extra configuration for container %s", container.Name, containerInspected.Name)
364: 			return ""
365: 		}
366: 
367: 		if extraConf.Docker.Network == "" {
368: 			extraConf.Docker.Network = container.ExtraConf.Docker.Network
369: 		}
370: 
371: 		containerParsed.ExtraConf = extraConf
372: 		return p.getIPAddress(ctx, containerParsed)
373: 	}
374: 
375: 	for _, network := range container.NetworkSettings.Networks {
376: 		if netNotFound {
377: 			logger.Warn().Msgf("Defaulting to first available network (%q) for container %q.", network, container.Name)
378: 		}
379: 		return network.Addr
380: 	}
381: 
382: 	logger.Warn().Msg("Unable to find the IP address.")
383: 	return ""
384: }
385: 
386: func (p *DynConfBuilder) getPortBinding(container dockerData, serverPort string) (*nat.PortBinding, error) {
387: 	port := getPort(container, serverPort)
388: 
389: 	for netPort, portBindings := range container.NetworkSettings.Ports {
390: 		if strings.EqualFold(string(netPort), port+"/TCP") || strings.EqualFold(string(netPort), port+"/UDP") {
391: 			for _, p := range portBindings {
392: 				return &p, nil
393: 			}
394: 		}
395: 	}
396: 
397: 	return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to find the external IP:Port for the container %q", container.Name)
398: }

23: default: generate binary

28:

33:

37: 	rm -r webui/static

40: 
41: webui/static/index.html:
42: 	$(MAKE) build-webui-image
43: 	docker run --rm -v "$(PWD)/webui/static":'/src/webui/static' traefik-webui npm run build:nc
44: 	docker run --rm -v "$(PWD)/webui/static":'/src/webui/static' traefik-webui chown -R $(shell id -u):$(shell id -g) ./static
45: 
46: .PHONY: generate-webui
47: #? generate-webui: Generate WebUI
48: generate-webui: webui/static/index.html
49: 
50: .PHONY: generate

52: generate:

54: 
55: .PHONY: binary

57: binary: generate-webui dist
58: 	@echo SHA: $(VERSION) $(CODENAME) $(DATE)
59: 	CGO_ENABLED=0 GOGC=off GOOS=${GOOS} GOARCH=${GOARCH} go build ${FLAGS[*]} -ldflags "-s -w \
60:     -X github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/version.Version=$(VERSION) \
61:     -X github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/version.Codename=$(CODENAME) \
62:     -X github.com/traefik/traefik/v3/pkg/version.BuildDate=$(DATE)" \
63:     -installsuffix nocgo -o "./dist/${GOOS}/${GOARCH}/$(BIN_NAME)" ./cmd/traefik
64: 
65: binary-linux-arm64: export GOOS := linux
66: binary-linux-arm64: export GOARCH := arm64
67: binary-linux-arm64:
68: 	@$(MAKE) binary
69: 
70: binary-linux-amd64: export GOOS := linux
71: binary-linux-amd64: export GOARCH := amd64
72: binary-linux-amd64:
73: 	@$(MAKE) binary
74: 
75: binary-windows-amd64: export GOOS := windows
76: binary-windows-amd64: export GOARCH := amd64
77: binary-windows-amd64: export BIN_NAME := traefik.exe
78: binary-windows-amd64:
79: 	@$(MAKE) binary
80: 
81: .PHONY: crossbinary-default

83: crossbinary-default: generate generate-webui
84: 	$(CURDIR)/script/crossbinary-default.sh
85: 
86: .PHONY: test
87: #? test: Run the unit and integration tests
88: test: test-ui-unit test-unit test-integration
89: 
90: .PHONY: test-unit
91: #? test-unit: Run the unit tests
92: test-unit:
93: 	GOOS=$(GOOS) GOARCH=$(GOARCH) go test -cover "-coverprofile=cover.out" -v $(TESTFLAGS) ./pkg/... ./cmd/...
94: 
95: .PHONY: test-integration
96: #? test-integration: Run the integration tests
97: test-integration: binary
98: 	GOOS=$(GOOS) GOARCH=$(GOARCH) go test ./integration -test.timeout=20m -failfast -v $(TESTFLAGS)
99: 
100: .PHONY: test-gateway-api-conformance
101: #? test-gateway-api-conformance: Run the conformance tests
102: test-gateway-api-conformance: build-image-dirty
103: 	# In case of a new Minor/Major version, the k8sConformanceTraefikVersion needs to be updated.
104: 	GOOS=$(GOOS) GOARCH=$(GOARCH) go test ./integration -v -test.run K8sConformanceSuite -k8sConformance -k8sConformanceTraefikVersion="v3.2" $(TESTFLAGS)

106: .PHONY: test-ui-unit
107: #? test-ui-unit: Run the unit tests for the webui
108: test-ui-unit:
109: 	$(MAKE) build-webui-image

111: 	docker run --rm -v "$(PWD)/webui/static":'/src/webui/static' traefik-webui yarn --cwd webui test:unit:ci
112: 
113: .PHONY: pull-images
114: #? pull-images: Pull all Docker images to avoid timeout during integration tests
115: pull-images:
116: 	grep --no-filename -E '^\s+image:' ./integration/resources/compose/*.yml \
117: 		| awk '{print $$2}' \
118: 		| sort \
